name: property managers handling 5–15 tenant invoices/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late rent payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate late notice reminders instead of manual tracking of rent payments and reminders.
features: manual entry of tenant payment data

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late rent payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate late notice reminders instead of manual tracking of rent payments and reminders.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of rent payments and reminders
must_have_features: manual entry of tenant payment data

one_liner: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late rent payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate late notice reminders instead of manual tracking of rent payments and reminders.
